translation.about_intro: Hello. My name is Florent GERARD and I created this site to promote my creations and share my passion for web development with you.
translation.contact_success: Thank you! Your message has been sent successfully. I will get back to you very soon.
translation.poster_desc: These posters were created in 2023 for the company MK Services located in Bangui, capital of the Central African Republic
translation.under_construction_text: This section of the site is currently being redesigned to offer you a better experience. I am actively working on it to bring it online very soon. Thank you for your patience.
translation.patience: A little patience, I'm almost done ;-)
translation.questions: If you have any questions, you can reach me here:
translation.not_found_subtitle: Oops! This page does not exist.
translation.not_found_text: It seems you've wandered off. The page you are looking for is not available or has been moved.
